name: PERSHING SQUARE INC.
business: Pershing Square Inc. is an alternative asset manager that manages permanent capital funds and earns management fees and performance fees. It generates substantially all of its revenue in the United States.

exposures.sentence: PSCM intends to manage the assets of Vantage's insurance company subsidiaries in accordance with applicable regulatory and rating agency requirements.
while continuing to invest in and grow its MPC real estate business.

catalysts.sentence: On May 5, 2025, we completed the Howard Hughes Transaction.
The Vantage Acquisition is expected to close in the second quarter of 2026, subject to customary regulatory approvals and closing conditions.

catalysts.event: Proposal to UMG board concerning business combination with SPARC
catalysts.sentence: On April 7, 2026, we announced that we had made a proposal to the UMG board of directors concerning a business combination transaction in which UMG would merge with SPARC.

tamClaims.claim: Individual investors are projected to increase alternative allocations from $4 trillion to $13 trillion from 2022 to 2032
tamClaims.sentence: Individual investors are expected to be the fastest growing segment among investors allocating to alternative assets and are projected to increase their alternatives allocations from $4 trillion to $13 trillion over the 10-year period from 2022 to 2032.
